overview: AI Behavior Playground is an interactive dark-themed simulator where users configure two AI agents with distinct personalities (Logical, Aggressive, Funny, Emotional), set a conversation goal, and watch a 6-8 turn simulated debate/discussion unfold with typing effects, chat bubbles, and loading animations.
features: Dark-themed card-style UI with responsive centered layout
Personality selectors for Agent A and Agent B (Logical, Aggressive, Funny, Emotional)
Simulation Goal input with form validation
Scrollable chat window with auto-scroll to latest message
Message bubbles with left/right alignment per agent
